title: 处理缺货、替代方案和补货时间
theme: 从 out of stock / alternative / restock 开始
goals: 能礼貌说明产品暂时缺货，而不是直接说 no stock
能给客户推荐可用替代方案，减少订单流失
能说明补货时间、预订安排和下一步确认动作

review.title: Day 07 复习
items: 昨天练了 schedule、progress、delay、inspection 和 ready date。
今天继续练客户最常遇到的生产和库存问题：缺货、替代品、补货时间。
客户要的款式没有库存时，不要只说 no，要给 alternative 或 restock time。

preview.scenario: 客户想下单某个颜色、尺寸或款式，但工厂暂时没有库存，或者原材料短缺，需要你解释并推荐替代方案。
needToKnow: out of stock 比 no stock 更自然，但要配合替代方案。
alternative 和 substitute 都可以表示替代选择，商务回复里 alternative 更常用。
restock 是补货，客户常问 when will it be restocked。

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明产品、颜色或尺寸暂时无货。
vocabulary.example: This color is currently out of stock.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明可代替原产品的物料或产品。
vocabulary.example: We can use a similar material as a substitute.

vocabulary.meaning: 替代选择 / 备选方案
vocabulary.usage: 用于给客户推荐可选颜色、款式或方案。
vocabulary.example: I can recommend an alternative color for you.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明库存什么时候重新补上。
vocabulary.example: This item will be restocked next week.

vocabulary.meaning: 缺货待补订单 / 预订
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户可以先下单，等补货后发货的情况。
vocabulary.example: We can place this item on backorder if you can wait.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明原材料、包装或产能不足。
vocabulary.example: There is a temporary material shortage for this color.

vocabulary.usage: 用于列出客户可选择的方案。
vocabulary.example: I can offer two options for you.

vocabulary.usage: 用于向客户建议更合适的替代产品或方案。
vocabulary.example: I recommend the black color because it is available now.

sentences.label: 说明缺货
sentences.natural: This item is out of stock now.
sentences.business: This item is currently out of stock, but I can check the restock time for you.

sentences.label: 推荐替代颜色
sentences.business: I can recommend an alternative color that is available now.

sentences.label: 说明补货时间
sentences.natural: This item will be restocked next week.
sentences.business: This item is expected to be restocked next week, and I can reserve it for you if needed.

sentences.label: 说明材料短缺
sentences.natural: There is a material shortage now.
sentences.business: There is a temporary material shortage, so the lead time may be a little longer.

sentences.label: 给两个方案
sentences.natural: I can offer two options for you.
sentences.business: I can offer two options: wait for restock or choose an available alternative.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太直接，容易让客户觉得没有继续沟通的空间。
chatAnalysis.better: This item is currently out of stock.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: This item is currently out of stock, but I can check the restock time or recommend an alternative for you.

chatAnalysis.problem: 像命令客户换颜色，缺少推荐理由。
chatAnalysis.upgrade: I recommend the black color because it is available now and the lead time is shorter.

chatAnalysis.problem: 不够清楚，客户不知道等多久、是否可以先预订。
chatAnalysis.better: This item will be restocked next week.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: This item is expected to be restocked next week, and we can place it on backorder if you can wait.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：说明暂时缺货

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do you have this color in stock?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: This color is currently out of stock.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When will it be available again?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will check the restock time with our factory and update you today.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：推荐替代方案

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need the white color urgently.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The white color is currently out of stock, but I can recommend an alternative color that is available now.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Which color do you recommend?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I recommend the black color because it is available now and the lead time is shorter.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户不想等补货

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We cannot wait until next week.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I can offer two options: choose an available alternative or split the order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you ship the available quantity first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Let me check the available quantity and confirm if partial shipment is possible.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：缺货后推荐替代方案和补货安排

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we want to order the white color again.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Let me check the current stock for the white color first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need 2,000 pieces urgently.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will check the available quantity and restock time for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do you have enough stock now?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The white color is currently out of stock.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why is it out of stock?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: There is a temporary material shortage for this color.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When will it be restocked?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It is expected to be restocked next week, but I will confirm the exact date with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We cannot wait that long.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I can recommend an alternative color that is available now.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Which alternative do you recommend?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I recommend the black color because it is available now and the lead time is shorter.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Is the black color the same price?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Let me check the price again, but it should be very close to the white color.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we split the order?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, that may be possible. We can ship the available alternative first and wait for the white color restock.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we place the white color on backorder?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can place it on backorder if you can wait for the restock.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will the lead time be longer?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, because of the material shortage, the lead time may be a little longer.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please give me the best option.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The best option is to ship the available black color first and keep the white color on backorder.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please confirm the price and restock date today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will confirm the price, available quantity, and restock date with our factory today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. Please update us as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. I will update you as soon as I receive the final information.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：这个颜色目前缺货。
exercises.answer: This color is currently out of stock.
acceptable: this color is currently out of stock
this color is out of stock now
exercises.hint: out of stock 表示缺货。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：no stock
exercises.answer: This item is currently out of stock.
acceptable: this item is currently out of stock
this item is out of stock now

exercises.prompt: 填空：I can recommend an ____ color that is available now.
客户要的颜色缺货，哪个回复更适合？
options: This color is currently out of stock, but I can recommend an alternative color that is available now.
exercises.answer: This color is currently out of stock, but I can recommend an alternative color that is available now.
acceptable: this color is currently out of stock but i can recommend an alternative color that is available now
exercises.hint: 说明缺货后，要给替代方案。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：这个产品预计下周补货。
exercises.answer: This item is expected to be restocked next week.
acceptable: this item is expected to be restocked next week
this item will be restocked next week

exercises.prompt: 客户说：We cannot wait until next week. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: I understand. I can offer two options: choose an available alternative or split the order.
acceptable: i understand i can offer two options choose an available alternative or split the order
i can offer two options choose an available alternative or split the order
exercises.hint: 先表示理解，再给两个可执行方案。

homework: 把 out of stock、alternative、restock、shortage、recommend 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练缺货解释和替代方案推荐。
tomorrow: Day 9 会练客户改规格、改数量和改包装时的回复。
